mapper.sql: id, message_id, user_id, category, channel, title, content, biz_type, biz_id, is_read, is_deleted, send_status, created_at, read_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_message (message_id, user_id, category, channel, title, content, biz_type, biz_id, is_read, is_deleted, send_status, created_at, read_at) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{userId}, #{category}, #{channel}, #{title}, #{content}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{isRead}, #{isDeleted}, #{sendStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{readAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notification_message WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_message SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND category = #{category} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notification_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND category = #{category} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notification_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
